description: Default capabilities for SyncFolder - NFR7: Local config data readable only by creating Windows account. NFR8: No file operations outside configured paths enforced via PathGuard in Rust backend.

comments.note: NFR8 enforcement: Tauri v2 does not support dynamic path capabilities at runtime. Broad fs scope ($HOME/**) is intentional at Tauri level. The REAL NFR8 enforcement is PathGuard in Rust backend (src-tauri/src/services/path_guard/). All file operations MUST pass through PathGuard.validate_path() before execution.
